title: palicourea tunjaensis
intro: Palicourea tunjaensis, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a type of shrub native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Its extracts have been found to exhibit potential health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiparasitic properties. Palicourea tunjaensis is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in water to be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
